_comment: Cheffy dialogue tree. Data, not code -- copy and options change here without touching components. See CHEFFY-SYSTEM.md > Dialogue system.
_start: Id of the node Cheffy opens on.
_node_shape: Each entry in 'nodes' is { text, expression?, input?, options:[{label, goto? , action?}] }. 'goto' moves to another node id; 'action' runs a handler. expression is one of: neutral|excited|thinking|sleepy -- NOTE: only neutral|excited|thinking are actually rendered by Cheffy.astro's SVG today; do not author 'sleepy'. input:true shows a free-text field.
_actions: Valid option 'action' values the runtime must implement: generate-ics | generate-ics-meal | open-google-calendar | trigger-permission | navigate-to-archive | export-checklist | import-checklist | close.

root.text: Hi, I'm Cheffy. Want a hand with this week?

options.label: Add cooking times to my calendar

calendar.text: I can add all of this week's cooking times to your calendar.

notifications.text: I can send you a reminder right when it's time to cook.

checklist.text: I can export or import this week's grocery checklist.

search.text: Type a week or a meal name and I'll jump there.
